title: Sharpness Enchantment Overhaul
description: Overhaul Sharpness enchantment to make it more balanced, while adding more feature to it and also to Smite and Bane of Arthropods
body:
- This mod changes how sharpness work massively:
  + Shaprness now only work on non-undead and non-arthropod.
  + Attacking undead with sharpness has a 2 percent to give weakness to the mob (configurable).
  + Attacking arthropod with sharpness has a 4 percent to give slowness to the mob (configurable).
  + For excluded target in "sharpnessExcludedEntityIds": [], 2% to give slowness to the mob (configurable).
- By default, sharpness is 20% more effective:
  ![Board](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42bb3df402fd9e8c49f776e5081e7718c68735f5.png)

- Smite change:
  + 3% to give player regeneration when hitting non-undead mobs (configurable).

- Bane of Arthropods changes:
  + 4% to give slowness 2 to mob when hitting non-arthropod mobs (configurable).
  + 2% to give weakness to mob when hitting non-arthropod mobs  (configurable).

All configuration go to config/sharpness_enchantment_overhaul.json.
